top_stories.title: AWS launches frontier agents for security testing and cloud operations
top_stories.description: I'm excited to announce that AWS Security Agent on-demand penetration testing and AWS DevOps Agent are now generally available, representing a new class of AI capabilities we announced at re:Invent called frontier agents. These autonomous systems work independently to achieve goals, scale massively to tackle concurrent tasks, and run persistently for hours or days without constant human oversight. Together, these agents are changing the way we secure and operate software. In preview, customers...
top_stories.author: Swami Sivasubramanian
top_stories.content: I'm excited to announce that AWS Security Agent on-demand penetration testing and AWS DevOps Agent are now generally available, representing a new class of AI capabilities we announced at re:Invent called frontier agents. top_stories.description: Editor’s note: This post is part of Into the Omniverse, a series focused on how developers, 3D practitioners, and enterprises can transform their workflows using the latest advances in OpenUSD and NVIDIA Omniverse. top_stories.title: Tay Cities Region backed by up to £20 million from UK government to grow its thriving creative tech sector
top_stories.description: Investment will back local talent advancing creative technologies like computer games and virtual reality to drive new products and grow the economy.
top_stories.content: Investment will back local talent advancing creative technologies like computer games and virtual reality to drive new products and grow the economy.

top_stories.title: Meet A-Evolve: The PyTorch Moment For Agentic AI Systems Replacing Manual Tuning With Automated State Mutation And Self-Correction
top_stories.description: A team of researchers associated with Amazon has released A-Evolve, a universal infrastructure designed to automate the development of autonomous AI agents. The framework aims to replace the ‘manual harness engineering’ that currently defines agent development with a systematic, automated evolution process. The project is being described as a potential ‘PyTorch moment’ for agentic AI. […] The post Meet A-Evolve: The PyTorch Moment For Agentic AI Systems Replacing Manual Tuning With Automated...

top_stories.title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
top_stories.description: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.
